description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the debian:stable Docker image with no extra services. Define three stages: build, test, and dist, and include a before_script that runs apt update -qq and installs autoconf, automake, autopoint, dh-autoreconf, cppcheck, gettext, pkg-config, libtool, m4, autotools-dev, perl, help2man, asciidoctor, asciidoc-base, libsensors4-dev, libgtop2-dev, libudisks2-dev, libatasmart-dev, libxnvctrl-dev, libgtk-3-dev, libnotify-dev, libappindicator3-dev, libmicrohttpd-dev, libjson-c-dev, libcurl4-gnutls-dev, then runs autoreconf -i. In the build stage add a build job that runs ./configure then make clean all. In the test stage add three jobs: build-check runs ./configure, make clean all, make check; build-distcheck runs ./configure, make clean all, make distcheck; build-without-gsettings runs ./configure --with-gsettings=no then make clean all. In the dist stage add a dist job that runs ./configure, make clean all, make dist.
